session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 9361 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the pr-feedback-classifier skill and run it with the specified arguments.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Classify PR review feedback by filling in semantic fields from mechanical CLI output. 16→ 17→## Steps 18→ 19→1. **Run mechanical classification:** 20→ 21→ ```bash 22→ erk exec classify-pr-feedback [--pr <number>] [--include-resolved] 23→ ``` 24→ 25→ Pass `--pr <number>` if specified in `$ARGUMENTS`. Pass `--include-resolved` if specified in `$ARGUMENTS`. 26→ 27→ This returns JSON with mechanically pre-classified items: 28→ - **review_submissions**: PR-level reviews (classification: "actionable" | "informational" | "needs_llm") 29→ - **review_threads**: Inline review threads (pre_existing_candidate flag set for bot + restructured) 30→ - **discussion_comments**: Discussion comments (classification: "informational" | "needs_llm")
... [169 lines omitted] ...
104→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 106→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 144→ "error": null 159→## Error Case 173→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 191→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll run the mechanical classification step with PR 9361:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run mechanical PR feedback classification for PR 9361

session.tool_result:

session.assistant: Now I need to analyze the classification results and fill in semantic fields. Let me fetch the PR details to understand the context better:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Fetch detailed PR information for analysis

session.tool_result:
{"body":"## Summary

Add `erk exec reopen-contested-threads` command to detect and reopen PR review threads that were resolved by erk:pr-address but have received additional reviewer pushback comments. This enables pr-address to iterate on contested issues without manual intervention. Integration with pr-address workflow via Phase 0.5.

## Key Changes

- Add `unresolve_review_thread()` gateway method across ABC, real, and dry-run implementations
- Implement reopen-contested-threads exec command with pure detection logic and comprehensive test coverage
- Add PR_ADDRESS_MARKER to resolution comments for reliable contest detection
- Integrate into pr-address Phase 0.5 to run before classification and addressing
- Update erk-exec skill reference with new command documentation

<details>
<summary>Files Changed</summary>

### Added (3 files)
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/reopen_contested_threads.py` - Exec command with pure detection logic and test helpers
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_reopen_contested_threads.py` - Comprehensive unit tests covering detection and API failure scenarios
- GraphQL mutation for unresolving threads in github/graphql_queries.py

### Modified (10 files)
- `.claude/commands/erk/pr-address.md` - Add Phase 0.5 to call reopen-contested-threads before addressing
- `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` - Document reopen-contested-threads subcommand
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/abc.py` - Add unresolve_review_thread() abstract method
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/real.py` - GraphQL implementation of unresolve
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/dry_run.py` - No-op unresolve for dry-run
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py` - Register reopen-contested-threads command
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/resolve_review_thread.py` - Append PR_ADDRESS_MARKER to resolution comments
- `tests/fakes/gateway/github.py` - Add unresolve tracking and failure injection
- Documentation files (github-review-decision.md, status-indicators.md) - Minor formatting

</details>


<!-- WARNING: Machine-generated. Manual edits may break erk tooling. -->
<!-- erk:metadata-block:plan-header -->
<details>
<summary>plan-header</summary>

```yaml

schema_version: '2'
created_at: '2026-03-21T15:21:00+00:00'
created_by: schrockn
branch_name: plnd/reopen-contested-threads-03-21-1520
last_dispatched_run_id: '23383299189'
last_dispatched_node_id: WFR_kwLOPxC3hc8AAAAFccDUdQ
last_dispatched_at: '2026-03-21T15:59:45+00:00'

```

</details>
<!-- /erk:metadata-block:plan-header -->
---


To replicate this PR locally, run:

```
erk pr teleport 9361
```

## ✅ Test Coverage Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-21 08:41:41 PT

Found 0 violations. Excellent test coverage for all source additions.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Source Files

| File | Status | Tests |
|------|--------|-------|
| `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/reopen_contested_threads.py` | Added | ✅ `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_reopen_contested_threads.py` (415 lines) |
| `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/abc.py` | Modified | ➖ Excluded (ABC definition) |
| `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/dry_run.py` | Modified | ✅ Covered via integration tests |
| `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/graphql_queries.py` | Modified | ➖ Excluded (query constant) |
| `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/real.py` | Modified | ✅ Covered via fake gateway in tests |

### Test Coverage Summary

✅ **All source additions have corresponding tests**
- New command: 202 lines of source, 415 lines of test code
- Test-to-source ratio: 2.05:1
- Test scenarios: 16 unit + integration tests covering:
 - Detection logic (`_has_marker`, `_find_contested_threads`)
 - Command execution with no contested threads
 - Single and multiple contested threads
 - Mixed resolved/unresolved/manual scenarios
 - API failure per-thread (non-blocking)

✅ **Comprehensive test coverage includes:**
- Pure function tests (11 tests)
- Integration tests (5 tests)
- Error injection via fake gateway
- Tracking assertions for gateway calls

### Excluded Files

- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/abc.py` — ABC definition file (abstract method signatures only)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/graphql_queries.py` — Constant definitions (query strings)
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py` — CLI registration (import + add_command mechanical changes)
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/resolve_review_thread.py` — Minimal constant and existing feature enhancement

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-21 08:41:41 PT**: All source additions have test coverage. New `reopen_contested_threads` command with 415 lines of comprehensive tests covering detection logic, integration, and error scenarios.
